projectDescription: An AI-powered onchain DeFi portfolio risk intelligence tool built on Mantle Network that monitors positions in real time, scores risk, and triggers automated vault guard protections.
keyFeatures: Real-time DeFi position monitoring on Mantle Network
AI-powered risk scoring (0-100) with concentration and liquidation analysis
Vault Guard smart contracts for autonomous onchain asset protection
Scenario simulator for stress-testing portfolio under market conditions
Immutable onchain proof log for all AI decisions and vault guard actions
Live MNT and ETH price feeds via CoinGecko
MetaMask wallet integration with ENS resolution
Support for Agni Finance, Lendle, Mantle LST, and Init Capital protocols
Real-time alert feed with severity-based notifications
Demo mode for exploring features without a wallet
publicApiSurface: connectWallet() — connect MetaMask and load Mantle portfolio
loadDemo() — load simulated demo portfolio data
switchToMantle() — switch or add Mantle network in MetaMask
fetchBalances() — fetch MNT/ETH balances for connected wallet
fetchPrices() — fetch live MNT and ETH prices from CoinGecko
calcScore(mnt, eth) — compute portfolio risk score 10-95
updateSim() — run scenario simulation with price/volatility sliders
createGuard() — deploy a new vault guard rule
toggleVault(input) — enable or pause an existing vault guard
navigate(id, el) — switch between dashboard pages
